top_findings.summary: The skill is granted unrestricted Bash command execution (Bash(cmd:*)) for troubleshooting Cursor IDE errors. While troubleshooting may require some system checks (e.g., clearing caches, checking disk space), this permission allows arbitrary command execution beyond the scope of the stated purpose, including potentially harmful or privacy-invasive actions unrelated to fixing IDE errors. Additionally, the skill requests broad Read, Write, and Edit permissions without clear constraints, raising the risk of unnecessary access to sensitive files or system configurations.
